name: backport-pr
description: Backports a merged PR to a release branch by triggering the /backport bot, waiting for the bot-created PR, and filling in the shiproom template (Customer Impact, Testing, Risk, Regression?).
intent_triggers: use the backport pr agent skill
run a workflow for backport pr
我需要處理 backport pr 相關工作
幫我啟用 backport pr 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 backport pr

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the backport pr skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
